# Franco Ortiz

## About
Franco Ortiz is a strategic technical leader based in Argentina. He is the CEO & Founder of i1n (i1n.ai), a localization-as-code platform, and Technical Product Manager at Belo, a crypto/fiat wallet with +3.5M users.

## Current roles
- CEO & Founder at i1n (i1n.ai) — Building localization infrastructure for modern development teams
- Technical Product Manager at Belo (belo.app) — Bridging business goals and engineering execution for cross-border payment infrastructure

## Previous roles
- Frontend & Mobile Lead at Belo (Feb 2022 - Feb 2026) — Led migration from Flutter to React Native for +3.5M users
- Frontend Developer at Navent (May 2021 - Jan 2022) — Real estate platforms (Zonaprop, Imovelweb)
- Frontend Developer at Aconpy (Feb 2021 - May 2021) — Virtual wallet project

## Key projects
- i1n (https://i1n.ai) — Localization-as-code platform with CLI, dashboard, and AI-powered translation across 182 languages
- Belo App (https://belo.app) — Crypto/Fiat wallet for Android and iOS with +3.5M users

## Skills
- Technical: React, React Native, TypeScript, Node.js, Next.js, Astro, Mobile Architecture, AI flows, CI/CD
- Leadership: Roadmap Definition, Team Mentorship, GTM Strategy, Stakeholder Management, Product Analytics, Agile

## Contact
